title: Claude Fable 5 Just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts presents a video comparing Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8 for website design tasks across three difficulty levels, with emphasis on token efficiency and practical design outcome quality. The video demonstrates Fable 5's capability to extract design DNA and recreate complex website layouts from reference images.
writeup: Jack Roberts compares Claude Fable 5 against Opus 4.8 on website design tasks spanning three difficulty levels, scoring them on token efficiency and the quality of the resulting designs. The demonstrations focus on Fable 5's ability to extract design DNA from reference images and recreate complex website layouts from them. The takeaway centers on how the two models differ in producing practical design outcomes and in the token cost of getting there.
